ion-button-style md button button-round button-solid ion-activatable ion-focusable hydrated

reviewSummary.summary: The draft captures the primary login controls but contains duplicate password elements, noisy non-actionable content, weak semantic naming, and is missing critical navigation and validation elements required by the workflow.

issues.message: Two different elements represent the same password control using different locators, creating ambiguous downstream ownership and keyword generation.
issues.suggested_fix: Keep only the stronger business-relevant password field locator using id=password and remove the duplicate id=ion-input-1 entry.

issues.message: The element name is technically descriptive but inconsistent with business terminology used throughout the workflow and acceptance criteria.
issues.suggested_fix: Rename the element to username_field for consistency with workflow language and downstream keyword readability.

issues.message: The password control is classified as a generic textbox even though the workflow explicitly requires password masking behavior validation.
issues.suggested_fix: Classify the control as type password instead of textbox.

issues.message: The background content container is a layout-only wrapper with no meaningful workflow interaction or verification value.
issues.suggested_fix: Remove the background_content element from the approved page model.

issues.message: The workflow explicitly requires Back button navigation validation, but the Back button is missing from the draft artifact.
issues.suggested_fix: Add the Back button using locator id=auto_back_btn.

issues.message: The workflow explicitly requires Home button navigation validation, but the Home button is missing from the draft artifact.
issues.suggested_fix: Add the Home button using locator id=auto_home_btn.

issues.message: The workflow requires validation of a generic Failed authentication message for all authentication failures, but no validation/message element is included in the draft.
issues.suggested_fix: Add a generic authentication failed message element using a stable locator such as xpath=//*[contains(normalize-space(.),'Failed')].

issues.message: The locator id=ion-input-0 appears framework-generated and potentially unstable across builds or rendering cycles.
issues.suggested_fix: Prefer a semantic locator such as xpath=//input[@placeholder='User Name'] or another stable business-oriented attribute.

issues.message: The locator depends primarily on visible button text and may become brittle if UI text changes.
issues.suggested_fix: Enhance the locator with additional stable attributes if available while retaining readable intent.

approved_elements.name: username_field
approved_elements.description: Field used to enter the customer username during authentication.

approved_elements.name: password_field
approved_elements.description: Masked password entry field used during authentication.

approved_elements.name: sign_in_button
approved_elements.description: Button used to submit login credentials for authentication.

approved_elements.name: back_button
approved_elements.description: Navigation control used to return to the Home page without authentication.

approved_elements.name: home_button
approved_elements.description: Navigation control used to return to the Home page from the Login page.

approved_elements.name: generic_authentication_failed_message
approved_elements.description: Generic authentication failure message displayed after unsuccessful login attempts.
